assertions.title: Performance metrics display

steps.observed: Backtest panel with Run backtest tab visible
Backtest completed, Analyze result tab enabled

Metrics table shows: Total Profit (0.929% | 9293.27 CNY), Sharpe (0.21), Sortino (0.28), Calmar (0.06), Profit factor (1.069), Win/Draw/Loss (0/0/1), Max Drawdown ABS (-698293.87 CNY), Market change (0.000%)

evidence.consoleErrors: No schema/parsing errors. Only 404 AxiosErrors from unimplemented polling endpoints (balance, count, logs, health) which is expected behavior per AGENTS.md.
evidence.network: GET /api/v1/backtest -> 200 with all performance metrics populated

assertions.issues: Win/Draw/Loss shows '0/0/1' in FreqUI display but API returns 3 wins/0 draws/4 losses in strategy_comparison — likely a display-level issue in how FreqUI renders this field. Max Drawdown (Account) shows N/A% though Max Drawdown ABS is populated. All four requested metrics (win rate via Win/Draw/Loss, profit factor, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown) ARE displayed in the UI.

assertions.title: Strategy vs benchmark visual comparison

steps.action: After backtest, check Analyze result tab for benchmark data
steps.observed: Market change shows 0.000% — no actual benchmark index data. Just a static zero value.
Only shows Trades log bar chart and Trades durations box plot. No benchmark overlay or comparison chart.
Shows per-pair results list. 'Failed to load data' for pair candles. No benchmark comparison.

evidence.consoleErrors: 404 errors from getBacktestMarketChange and getPairHistory endpoints
evidence.network: API returns market_change: 0.0 and strategy_comparison array, but no actual benchmark index data (CSI 300 / ChiNext)

assertions.issues: No visual benchmark comparison exists. The 'Market change' metric shows 0.000% which indicates no real benchmark data is being computed. The API returns market_change: 0.0 but no actual index performance data. There is no chart or visual element comparing strategy returns against CSI 300 or ChiNext.

assertions.title: API schema FreqTrade compatibility

steps.action: Login to FreqUI and navigate through all backtest tabs
steps.observed: No TypeErrors, RangeErrors, or schema parsing errors in console

steps.action: Check browser console for errors after page load
steps.observed: 3 AxiosError: 404 from unimplemented endpoints (balance, count, logs, health). These are expected per AGENTS.md design — unimplemented endpoints return 404 JSON, never 500.

steps.action: Verify backtest results render correctly in FreqUI
steps.expected: All data displayed without JS errors
steps.observed: Strategy settings, metrics, results per pair, results per exit reason, single trades table — all rendered correctly. No schema mismatch errors.

evidence.consoleErrors: 3 AxiosError (404) from unimplemented polling endpoints — NOT schema/parsing errors. No TypeError, RangeError, or data parsing failures. FreqUI handled 404s gracefully.
evidence.network: GET /api/v1/profit -> 200, GET /api/v1/performance -> 200, GET /api/v1/whitelist -> 200, GET /api/v1/blacklist -> 200, GET /api/v1/status -> 200, GET /api/v1/backtest -> 200. All implemented endpoints return valid FreqTrade-compatible JSON.

assertions.issues: Minor: 404 errors from unimplemented endpoints (balance, count, logs, health) appear in console, but these are expected behavior per AGENTS.md and do not indicate schema incompatibility. Also, 'Notification: Not found' appeared on Visualize result tab when loading pair candle data for stock 002558, suggesting pair_candles endpoint may not handle all pairs.

frictions.description: Win/Draw/Loss metric displays '0/0/1' in FreqUI despite the API returning 3 wins, 0 draws, 4 losses in strategy_comparison. The display mapping appears incorrect.
Max Drawdown (Account) shows N/A% in FreqUI, though the API returns max_drawdown_account: -0.418272 in strategy_comparison. The field may not be mapped to the correct key that FreqUI expects.
Visualize result tab shows 'Failed to load data' for pair 002558 with a 'Notification: Not found' error, suggesting pair_candles endpoint may not handle all pairs or the data format is mismatched.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-UI-007: performance metrics display, VAL-CROSS-003: schema compatibility), 1 failed (VAL-BENCH-002: no visual benchmark comparison — market_change is 0.0 and no CSI 300/ChiNext chart exists).
